subject: warp/M in a virtual instance
body:
Hi Dimitry,

We are exploring the possibility of running Warp/M in a virtual instance of
Windows. Do you think that it is possible?

Best,
Pranav
--
Pranav Shah
Postdoctoral Research Fellow.

Division of Structural Biology,
Wellcome Trust Centre for Human Genetics,
University of Oxford,
Roosevelt Drive, Oxford OX3 7BN,
UK
